title: KrackherSMP
description: A private modpack for the KrackherSMP Servers.
body:
## A modpack for the KrackherSMP Servers


## Vanilla Features
- Performance enchancements such as sodium and c2me
- Beautify
- Shaders
- Voxy
- Resourcify
- Controller support
- VR support

## Modded Features
- Create and addons
- Create Aeronautics
- Farmers Delight and addons
- RPG Series mods
- Performance Enhancements
- Shaders
- Distant Horizons wither server support

You must be whitelisted to play on servers, but feel free to use the modpacks for your own :)
